title: zehneria mucronata
intro: Zehneria mucronata, also known as the Indian pennywort, is a type of herbaceous plant native to India and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Zehneria mucronata include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to create various remedies.
